name: e-connect-raycast-control
title: E-Connect Raycast Control
description: Control E-Connect devices, automations, and server status from Raycast.
author: thomas

commands.name: dashboard
commands.title: Dashboard
commands.subtitle: E-Connect
commands.description: View server health, alerts, and fleet summary

commands.name: devices
commands.title: Devices
commands.subtitle: E-Connect
commands.description: List devices and send quick power commands

commands.name: automations
commands.title: Automations
commands.subtitle: E-Connect
commands.description: Run or stop saved automations from Raycast

commands.name: open-web-ui
commands.title: Open Web UI
commands.subtitle: E-Connect
commands.description: Open the E-Connect web interface in your browser

preferences.name: serverAddress
preferences.title: Server IP:Port
preferences.description: Direct E-Connect backend endpoint for API keys. Use IP:Port like 192.168.1.25:8000 or paste the full URL from docs/API_KEYS.md.

preferences.name: apiKey
preferences.title: API Key
preferences.description: Server-side bearer API key created in WebUI -> Settings -> API Keys for that same server.

preferences.name: allowInsecureTls
preferences.title: TLS
preferences.description: Allow locally issued or self-signed certificates when using HTTPS.
preferences.label: Allow self-signed certificates
